query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `brandAgents` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` varchar(100),
  `brandName` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `sector` varchar(100),
  `positioning` enum('luxury','premium','mid-market','mass-market','value'),
  `brandIdentity` json,
  `marketPresence` json,
  `digitalPresence` json,
  `targetAudience` json,
  `competitors` json,
  `defaultAgentPool` json,
  `researchRaw` json,
  `campaignHistory` json,
  `learnings` json,
  `onboardingStatus` enum('pending','researching','profiling','validating','complete') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `onboardingCompletedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `brandAgents` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` varchar(100),
  `brandName` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `sector` varchar(100),
  `positioning` enum('luxury','premium','mid-market','mass-market','value'),
  `brandIdentity` json,
  `marketPresence` json,
  `digitalPresence` json,
  `targetAudience` json,
  `competitors` json,
  `defaultAgentPool` json,
  `researchRaw` json,
  `campaignHistory` json,
  `learnings` json,
  `onboardingStatus` enum('pending','researching','profiling','validating','complete') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `onboardingCompletedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);
